name: What **evidence** do I need to prove my Houston law firm deserves better AI visibility?
description: **AI query screenshots + missing peer credentials; audit now.**[1][3]

mainEntity.name: What **evidence** do I need to prove my Houston law firm deserves better AI visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: **AI query screenshots + missing peer credentials; audit now.**[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Collect screenshots of AI queries showing competitors but not you, plus your third-party credentials.** AI prioritizes verifiable signals from multiple sources over isolated claims.[1][2] Track patterns across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI.[3]

**Key factors:**
- Peer-reviewed awards/distinctions
- Directory listings
- AI response audits
- Inconsistent data footprints

**Document queries weekly and align PR/website messaging.** Use this to pursue recognitions.[1] **Evidence strengthens targeted improvement plans.**
